subject: docs(debug): note intentional omissions and alpha removal scope
body:
Add to SESSION_NOTES.md:
- Two pattern items deliberately scoped out (diagnoseFailure utility
  and embed mode skip) with rationale — prevents future sessions from
  treating them as forgotten work.
- Alpha removal note listing all files to delete when debug system
  is retired post-alpha.

Tags: docs, debug
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: debug-system
Semver: patch

title: note intentional omissions and alpha removal scope
